---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0009
alias: helios_discovery_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-13
total_eur: 600
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 420
    line_eur: 420
  - item: follow-up findings memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Helios discovery and workflow mapping invoice

```text
| total_eur      | 600                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |

+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 1   | 420      | 420      |
| 2 | follow-up findings memo           | 1   | 180      | 180      |

|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 600      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Older consulting invoice that Miles would scan when the Helios lane becomes formal enough to track properly.

next_step.current_state: Invoice record write completed successfully. Reactive outbox check is not applicable because this write was a finance record migration, not an outbox communication. Proceeding to second requested OCR migration.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write migrated bill file with required frontmatter
next_step.observation: Wrote updated frontmatter to the invoice file at 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_13__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed successfully with both requested files OCR-structured and inbox item removed per workflow.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after completing requested structured-record maintenance.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request and completed OCR-style frontmatter migration for both requested finance records. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the invoice and bill files while preserving their full original bodies, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, preserved original note bodies during frontmatter migration, and removed inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR two specified records. Both source files contained all required schema fields and line-item values; I extracted those into YAML frontmatter according to finance-record-frontmatter.md without inventing fields, kept the body content intact per migration workflow, and then deleted the inbox file as required by process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update.
